key.name: shortcut-center
key.summary: Shortcut to center window without resizing

key.name: shortcut-resize-center
key.summary: Shortcut to resize window to 80%x70% and center it

key.name: resize-width
key.description: Target width as a percentage of the work area width.

key.name: resize-height
key.description: Target height as a percentage of the work area height.
